source_pr.title: *: fix bugs when window function meets prepare
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

There're several problems when window function meets problem:
1. The `Name` of `ast.WindowSpec` is changed. It will cause error when execute a statement. fix 
1. We fill the paramMarker to NULL in when prepare it. It will cause bug in window function's frame bound.
fix #9748 
### What is changed and how it works?

Add a field to `paramMarker` so that we can know whether it's in prepare or in execute.
Then use the field to avoid some check if it's in prepare currently.

Don't change the `Name` field of `WindowSpec`, change it when necessary.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test (will add them later)

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change
 - Has exported variable/fields change
